headline: Sone Capital Management Adds to MarketAxess Stake, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: MarketAxess sits at the center of the shift toward electronic bond trading and investors are watching whether record activity is turning into deeper client reliance on its trading, data, and automation tools.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on IDEX Corporation Stock?
summary: Although IDEX Corporation has underperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the company’s long-term growth prospects.
